tasks.title: Create project structure: main.py, src/__init__.py, src/timer.py, src/ui.py, src/tray.py, src/sound.py, assets/ folder, requirements.txt with customtkinter pystray pillow pygame
Create README.md with app description, install steps using uv venv and uv pip install -r requirements.txt, and run instructions python main.py
tasks.description: Simple readme explaining what Chronos is and how to run it

tasks.title: Implement Timer class in src/timer.py with start, pause, resume, reset, stop methods. Runs in background thread, fires callback every second. Supports countdown and stopwatch modes. Triggers alert callback on countdown completion.
tasks.description: Core timer logic, no UI dependencies

tasks.title: Generate alert sound file assets/alert.wav programmatically using pygame or wave module. Simple short beep tone.
tasks.description: Generate the wav file in code so no external assets needed

tasks.title: Generate app icon assets/chronos.ico programmatically using Pillow. Simple clock face design.
tasks.description: Generate the ico file in code so no external assets needed

tasks.title: Build main CustomTkinter window in src/ui.py: dark theme, 400x320px, no resize, window title Chronos, app icon set. Large HH:MM:SS digital display centered using monospace font. Mode toggle Countdown/Stopwatch at top.
tasks.description: Base window and time display only, no controls yet

tasks.title: Add countdown input fields hours/minutes/seconds below mode toggle, visible only in countdown mode. Add Start, Pause/Resume, Reset control buttons with rounded corners.
tasks.description: Input fields and control buttons wired to Timer class

tasks.title: Add progress bar showing percentage remaining in countdown mode. Add color shift on completion: time display flashes red. Add always-on-top toggle checkbox in bottom corner.
Implement sound module in src/sound.py: play alert.wav on countdown completion, mute toggle. Add mute button to UI.
tasks.description: Sound playback via pygame mixer wired to timer alert callback

tasks.title: Add keyboard shortcuts: Space = Start/Pause/Resume, R = Reset, M = Mute toggle, Escape = minimize to tray.
tasks.description: Bind keys in the CustomTkinter window

tasks.title: Implement system tray in src/tray.py using pystray: app minimizes to tray on window close, tray menu shows Restore/Start/Pause/Reset/Quit options.
tasks.description: pystray integration runs in separate thread

tasks.title: Wire everything in main.py: import Timer, UI, tray. Handle clean shutdown stopping threads and removing tray icon. Add if __name__ == '__main__' guard.
tasks.description: Entry point only, no logic here

tasks.title: Test: start a 5-second countdown, verify completion alert fires and display flashes red, verify reset works, verify mute toggle works.
tasks.description: Smoke test to verify the full app works end to end
